title: Visual Poster AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Dopamine C4D 3D poster for "Play Wildly". Hero Object: a glossy inflatable tiger-shaped sneaker bursting through a soft cube frame, visualizing the theme in a memorable playful way. Supporting Shapes: bouncy spheres, ribbon loops, star puffs, and small paw-shaped icons, arranged with clean design hierarchy and controlled negative space. Palette: electric blue, hot coral, lime green, sunny yellow, and clean white, high-saturation but balanced and polished. Background: matte off-white studio background with soft floor shadow, minimalist and bright. Typography: rounded bold sans-serif title tucked behind the hero object, readable poster text integrated with the 3D composition. Mood: energetic, mischievous, cheerful, and premium; Behance/Dribbble 3D illustration poster aesthetic, soft-light rendering, refined detail. Restrictions: No random text, no chaotic gradient blobs, no muddy shadows, no watermark, no cheap toy clutter.
